meta.notes: Fresh rerun of the Codex benchmark prompt with each timed step executed separately. No install step and no upload step. MiniMax music generation dominated the full skill run. The dev log reported a 51.6s music generation phase, 26 detected scene changes, auto-selected sync mode, and replace-mode audio mixing. Token totals came from tools/extract-codex-tokens.py --latest --json after the benchmark run.

test_input.name: charli-daily-vlog.mp4
test_input.description: Portrait vlog benchmark asset with spoken English audio for hype beat-synced background music.

task.name: music-beat-sync
task.purpose: Benchmark the local music-beat-sync skill against the standard 67.8s daily vlog asset using hype vibe beat-synced background music.
task.expected_output: A locally generated mp4 with hype background music and scene cuts aligned to beats.

install.notes: Not applicable. The skill was already present locally at ~/code/nova3-agent-skills/music-beat-sync/.

steps.name: scene_detection
steps.notes: Standalone ffmpeg scene detection found 26 cuts.

steps.name: music_generation_minimax
steps.notes: Parsed from the dev log emitted by beat_sync.py during the full skill run. Generated a 22.2s track for vibe=hype at 120 BPM.

steps.name: beat_alignment_encode
steps.notes: Not individually timed by the benchmark prompt. During the full skill run, auto mode selected sync and aligned 26 detected cuts across 27 encoded segments.

steps.name: audio_mix
steps.notes: Not individually timed by the benchmark prompt. Full run used replace-mode audio mixing in S5.

steps.name: beat_sync_full
steps.notes: Full beat_sync.py run with --vibe hype --dev. Produced /tmp/beat-sync/beat_sync_output.mp4.

execution.notes: Execution total is the sum of separately measured execution commands: probe + standalone scene detection + full beat_sync.py run.

delivery.notes: Local delivery only; output remained on disk at /tmp/beat-sync/beat_sync_output.mp4.

tokens._note: Nulled: extract-codex-tokens.py reported session-cumulative totals, not per-task usage. All 8 skills ran in a single Codex session with monotonically increasing token counts.

cost._note: Nulled: derived from unreliable session-cumulative token counts.
